parameters-en.Speed: Controls the rate of the vibrato.
parameters-en.Freq: Controls filter content, adding second order harmonics.
parameters-en.Q: Controls the width of the filters, from mild to wild.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the depth of the vibrato.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the synth and the dry signal. At 0%, no synth is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
